title: Report live active-paper elapsed time in run monitor
problem: The run monitor currently reports the elapsed_seconds attached to the last event for the active paper. During long Codex calls this value can stay fixed for minutes, which makes the monitor sample look stale even though the process is still running.
proposed_change: Compute and expose a live active_elapsed_seconds field from the current sample timestamp minus the active paper's latest phase-start timestamp, while keeping event elapsed_seconds for historical event ordering.
acceptance_criteria: monitor-run JSON samples show both event elapsed_seconds and live active_elapsed_seconds for active papers; tests cover a long-running extraction with no new events; CLI output remains backward-compatible.
